name: Beround Internal Marketplace
description: Private plugin catalog for Beround employees. Internal use only.

plugins.name: Beround Security Hardening
plugins.description: Security hardening suite for Claude Code. Installs 10 protective hooks and sync/scan/research skills. Required for all Beround Claude Code users.
plugins.author: Beround Security Team
plugins.install_notes: Requires Git Bash on Windows. On first install, /security-sync runs automatically to fetch latest signatures from GitHub repo claude-security-signatures.
